description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved brigatinib for reimbursement as a monotherapy treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) previously not treated with an ALK inhibitor, and whose ALK rearrangement has been demonstrated by an accurate and validated test method.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute
